spec.description: Reference environment: Intel NUC 6i, Proxmox VE (PVE), lm-sensors + node-exporter hwmon.

spec.title: CPU Temps (Package/Core)
spec.description: Uses hwmon labels for readable CPU package/core names. Filter labels if needed.

spec.title: CPU Package vs Max/Crit
spec.description: Package temperature vs max/critical thresholds from hwmon.

spec.expr: node_hwmon_temp_celsius{instance=~"$instance"} * on(chip,instance,job) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance=~"$instance", chip_name="coretemp"} * on(chip,sensor,instance,job) group_left(label) node_hwmon_sensor_label{instance=~"$instance", label=~"Package.*"}

node_hwmon_temp_max_celsius{instance=~"$instance"} * on(chip,instance,job) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance=~"$instance", chip_name="coretemp"} * on(chip,sensor,instance,job) group_left(label) node_hwmon_sensor_label{instance=~"$instance", label=~"Package.*"}

node_hwmon_temp_crit_celsius{instance=~"$instance"} * on(chip,instance,job) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance=~"$instance", chip_name="coretemp"} * on(chip,sensor,instance,job) group_left(label) node_hwmon_sensor_label{instance=~"$instance", label=~"Package.*"}

spec.title: CPU Critical Alarm
spec.description: Critical temperature alarm per CPU label (if exposed by hwmon).

spec.expr: node_hwmon_temp_crit_alarm_celsius{instance=~"$instance"} * on(chip,instance,job) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance=~"$instance", chip_name="coretemp"} * on(chip,sensor,instance,job) group_left(label) node_hwmon_sensor_label{instance=~"$instance", label=~"Package.*|Core .*"}

spec.title: Board Temps (SYSTIN/CPUTIN/AUXTIN/PECI/PCH)
spec.description: Board thermistors via Super I/O chips; labels differ by motherboard.

spec.title: ACPI / PCH Temps
spec.description: ACPI thermal zones and PCH virtual temps; may include 0.0°C channels.

spec.title: Fan RPM
spec.description: Fan RPM from Super I/O chips; missing fans appear as 0 or absent.

spec.title: PWM Duty
spec.description: PWM control values (0-255). Some platforms do not expose PWM.

spec.title: Hardware Alarm Status
spec.description: Aggregated alarm indicator across temp/fan/voltage.

spec.title: Voltage Rails
spec.description: Voltage rails from Super I/O chips; map sensors to rails per motherboard.

spec.title: Voltage Alarms
spec.description: Voltage alarm status; verify thresholds and mapping per board.

spec.title: Active Alarms
spec.description: All active hwmon alarms with readable chip/label names.

spec.expr: (((node_hwmon_temp_alarm{instance=~"$instance"} or node_hwmon_fan_alarm{instance=~"$instance"} or node_hwmon_in_alarm{instance=~"$instance"}) * on(chip,sensor,instance,job) group_left(label) node_hwmon_sensor_label{instance=~"$instance"}) or (label_replace((node_hwmon_temp_alarm{instance=~"$instance"} or node_hwmon_fan_alarm{instance=~"$instance"} or node_hwmon_in_alarm{instance=~"$instance"}), "label", "$1", "sensor", "(.*)"))) * on(chip,instance,job) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance=~"$instance"}

spec.title: Chassis Intrusion
spec.description: Chassis intrusion status.

spec.title: Beep Enabled
spec.description: Hardware beep enabled status.

spec.title: CPU Usage
spec.description: CPU usage (non-idle) over 5m.

spec.title: CPU Package Temp
spec.description: CPU package temperature (coretemp temp1).

spec.expr: node_hwmon_temp_celsius{instance=~"$instance"} * on(chip,instance,job) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance=~"$instance", chip_name="coretemp"} * on(chip,sensor,instance,job) group_left(label) node_hwmon_sensor_label{instance=~"$instance", label=~"Package.*"}

spec.title: Memory Usage
spec.description: Memory usage.

spec.title: Swap Usage
spec.description: Swap usage.

spec.title: Disk Read
spec.description: Disk read throughput.

spec.title: Disk Write
spec.description: Disk write throughput.

spec.title: Uptime
spec.description: System uptime.

spec.title: Intel PC Server Hardware Monitoring (node-exporter hwmon)
